intentSynonyms: look up a feed in onlyfans
fetch a single feed in onlyfans
view one specific feed in onlyfans
get your content feed in onlyfans
description: Get the main content feed with posts from subscribed creators. Returns posts in reverse chronological order with pagination support.

limit.description: Number of posts to return (default 10, max 50)

offset.description: Pagination marker from a previous response (tail_marker)
